name: Lemon Delight Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Or use 2 8-ounce containers of Philadelphia soft cream cheese.
- Combine cracker crumbs, sugar and margarine; reserve 1/2 cup. Press remaining mixture onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
- Soften gelatin in water, stirring until dissolved over low heat. Add lemon juice, egg yolks, 1/4 cup sugar, and peel; cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly over medium heat.
- Gradually add to cream cheese, mixing at a medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
- Beat egg whites until foamy; gradually add remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks form. Fold into the cream cheese mixture. Pour over crust and top with reserved crumbs. Chill until firm.
